chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 412 of 2017 SCRA 413 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2672/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.2673/2017. 12.01.2026 Matter is pending since 2017 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that applicant is not interested in the proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
